title: Instagram down? Thousands report issues accessing social media platform, frustrated netizens say ‘whole thing is broken’
summary: Instagram is experiencing access issues, with over 10,000 user reports on Downdetector. The peak of complaints occurred around 8:59 AM India time.

title: Incentives, value addition boost made-in-India laptops
summary: Driven by government incentives, Made in India laptops now account for nearly 30% of domestic sales, up from less than 5% in 2024. Local manufacturers like Dixon and Syrma SGS are aggressively scaling capacity to offset a slowdown in the smartphone sector.

title: Michael Burry claims Nvidia used ‘mafia-like’ tactics to block AMD in Oracle data center deal, calls for antitrust probe
summary: Despite cancelling the planned 600-MW expansion at the Abilene site, Oracle and OpenAI’s broader plan to build 4.5 gigawatts of AI data centre capacity remains on track.

title: iPhone Fold leaks: Expected price, release date, specifications and more
summary: Apple's upcoming foldable iPhone, likely called iPhone Ultra, is likely to launch later this year. The phone could feature a dual rear camera setup and four cameras in total.&nbsp;

title: Russia-backed hackers target Signal and WhatsApp accounts: How the attack works, how to stay safe and more
summary: Dutch intelligence agencies warned of a global cyber campaign by Russian-backed hackers targeting Signal and WhatsApp accounts of officials and journalists. Hackers are using phishing techniques to gain access to the accounts, urging victims to provide SMS codes or PINs.

title: Xiaomi Pad 8 with Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 processor, 9,200mAh battery launched in India: Price, specs and more
summary: Xiaomi has launched the Pad 8 tablet in India, featuring a Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 processor, a 9200mAh battery, and a 144Hz LCD display. The tablet starts at a price of ₹33,999 in India.

title: iPhone 18 Pro, iPhone 18 Pro Max launching this year: Expected price, specs and more

title: Poco X8 Pro, Poco X8 Pro confirmed to launch in India on 17 March: Expected price, specs and more
summary: Poco is set to launch the Poco X8 Pro and X8 Pro Max 5G in India on March 17. Both mid-range gaming phones are likelyto feature MediaTek Dimensity processors with massive batteries and AMOLED display.

title: Samsung Galaxy M17e 5G full specifications revealed ahead of 17 March India launch: here's what to expect
summary: Samsung has unveiled the Galaxy M17e 5G, featuring a dual rear camera, 8MP front camera, 6000mAh battery and a 6.7-inch HD+ display. The phone will debut on 17 March and is expected to come in the sub- ₹20,000 price bracket.

title: China moves to curb use of OpenClaw AI at banks, state agencies: Bloomberg
summary: Chinese government agencies and state-owned enterprises, including major banks, have been warned not to install OpenClaw software on office devices due to security concerns, according to a Bloomberg News report citing people familiar.

title: Snabbit seeks fresh funding at $450 million valuation as house-help market expands
summary: Household-help app Snabbit is discussing fresh funding at about a $450 million valuation. The Bengaluru startup offers instant help for cooking or cleaning. Investors see growth in India’s largely offline home-services market, expected to reach $100 billion, as rising urban incomes drive demand.

title: Microsoft files amicus brief in support of Anthropic's lawsuit with US DOD
summary: Microsoft filed a proposed brief supporting Anthropic’s lawsuit seeking to temporarily block the US Department of Defense designation of the AI startup as a supply-chain risk. The company said the decision directly affects it and could cause costly disruptions for suppliers relying on Anthropic’s te

title: ChatGPT, other AI chatbots approved for official use in US Senate: NYT
summary: A memo says ChatGPT, Google’s Gemini chat and Microsoft Copilot are approved for official use by aides in the US Senate. The tools are already integrated into Senate platforms. Microsoft said it was reviewing the approval, while Google and OpenAI gave no comment.

title: US Stock Market | SoftBank's PayPay plans to price US IPO around low end of range, sources say
summary: The initial public offering of SoftBank's PayPay ​is likely to price around the low end of its marketing range as war in the Middle East roil markets, said ‌two people ⁠familiar ⁠with the matter.

title: Paras Chopra’s Lossfunk gets AI models to speak Tulu through prompts, not training
summary: Lossfunk, an AI lab founded by Paras Chopra, created a prompting method that helps large language models produce Tulu text without prior training. Using grammar rules and negative constraints, accuracy reached about 85%. The approach may help expand AI support for low-resource Indian languages witho

title: Gulf crisis hits restaurants, food delivery, cross-border payments
summary: Happy Wednesday! The Iran crisis is starting to dent business for restaurants, food delivery apps and cross-border payments firms as disruptions to shipping routes ripple through trade and supply chains. This and more in today's ETtech Morning Dispatch.

title: Gulf crisis clouds cross-border payments startups’ business outlook
summary: About 10% of India’s ecommerce exports – estimated at around $150 billion annually – are routed through the UAE. Disruptions in key shipping routes, including the Strait of Hormuz, have impacted shipments transiting through the Gulf region.

title: AI impact on IT revenue to be more than estimated: Kotak
summary: Indian IT service providers could face a 3.0-3.5% fall in revenue in the next two fiscal years, compared with the earlier estimate for a 2.0-3.0% hit, because of enterprises adopting artificial intelligence tools and automation faster than previously expected, according to Kotak Institutional Equiti
